patterns.pattern_name: Implied Consent (Sneak into Basket / Default Opt-In)
patterns.ethical_concern: Violates active consent principles by assuming permission based on passive actions.
Creates asymmetric difficulty, making it easy to sign up but hard to opt out or delete data.
Forces the collection of non-essential personal information as a condition of service.
Manipulates user attention and psychological triggers to maximize time-on-app at the expense of mental health.

keywords: exclude users based on zip code
patterns.ethical_concern: Enables discriminatory ad delivery or content filtering based on sensitive personal characteristics.
